meta.title: EasySite - Build Websites with AI
meta.description: Create beautiful websites instantly using AI. Free to start, no coding required.

home.heroSubtitle: Describe what you want, and AI creates it for you. No coding needed. Free to start.
home.featureAIDesc: Describe your site in plain language, AI handles the rest.
home.featureInstantDesc: Your site goes live with a shareable URL in seconds.
home.featureFreeDesc: Build up to 3 sites for free. Upgrade for more features.
home.featureManageDesc: Log in to manage, edit, and update your sites anytime.
home.step1Desc: Tell AI what kind of website you want — a portfolio, landing page, blog, and more.
home.step2Desc: Our AI generates a beautiful, responsive website in seconds.
home.step3Desc: Publish your site with one click and share the URL with the world.
